nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Kingston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places throughout England called Kingston or Kingstone. Almost all of them derive from Old English cyning, cing ‘king’ (genitive cyninges, cinges) + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have a different etymology, such as Kingston on Soar in Nottinghamshire, which derives from Old English cyne ‘royal’ + stān ‘stone’.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: John de Kingston was born in 1280, in Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Jordan de Kingston - Lord of Kingston. He had at least 2 daughters with Mathilda De Kingston. He died in 1356, in his hometown, at the age of 76.

ko.lifeSummary: John de Kingston(은)는 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트에서 Jordan de Kingston - Lord of Kingston의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Mathilda De Kingston(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1356년 그의 고향에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.
